techniques.evidence_quote: This vulnerability allows threat actors to inject custom PHP code through the SugarCRM email templates module
started executing commands to create new RDS snapshots

failed Root logins stood out in the CloudTrail logs

utilized the tools Pacu and Scout Suite to gain a better understanding of what resources existed within the AWS account
these tools scanned a variety of traditional services such as... EC2... RDS... S3...

attached existing security groups to the EC2 instances that allowed inbound port 22 access from any IP address
